# Third-party components

Magazine73 includes third-party software under permissive licenses. Each
component is vendored locally inside this repository.

## StPageFlip 2.0.7

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Project | StPageFlip (`page-flip`) |
| Version | 2.0.7 |
| Author | Oleg (Nodlik) |
| Source | https://github.com/Nodlik/StPageFlip |
| License | MIT |

Files are stored in `plugin/magazine73/third-party/stpageflip/`. The original MIT license is
included as `plugin/magazine73/third-party/stpageflip/LICENSE`. See
`plugin/magazine73/third-party/stpageflip/NOTICE.md` for attribution details.
